response: The April investor update highlights key achievements including surpassing 10,000 monthly active users, closing a Series A term sheet for $8 million at a $40 million pre-money valuation, and hiring a VP of Sales. Current metrics show $85,000 in monthly recurring revenue (up 12% month-over-month), a $120,000 monthly burn rate providing 11 months of runway post-raise, with the fundraising scheduled to close on May 10.
